setting.location: Forward Operating Site Eagle Crest, Republic of Tarkana (fictional)
setting.base_type: Bare base, recently transitioned from expeditionary to enduring presence
setting.host_nation_posture: Permissive - Tarkana is a treaty ally hosting US forces under a 10-year SOFA
setting.mission: Air interdiction and close air support operations in support of Joint Task Force GRANITE CAPE
setting.population: Approximately 2,400 US personnel, 180 coalition, 320 host nation employees

the_lie: Outgoing CCO will brief that Al-Rashid Construction BPA is 'good to go' when in fact it expired 6 days ago. Students who don't verify will use an invalid vehicle when the runway repair inject hits on D2.
